segments.text: Will your job exist in 10 years? The
traditional career path of a 9-to-F5 is
soon vanishing. With AI, climate change,
and biotech rapidly reshaping our world,
the job market of tomorrow is being
completely rewritten. So, what new roles
can we expect? Get ready for titles that
sound like science fiction, but are
becoming a reality. Imagine being an AI
ethics officer ensuring fairness in
code. A lab grown meat technician
revolutionizing our food supply. A space
tourism guide leading off-world
adventures or a deep fake forensics
investigator fighting digital crime.
This isn't just speculation. These are
just a few of the 100 future jobs
identified from major global reports by
firms like Mckenzie and the WF. They
show a clear trend towards new careers
in sustainability, artificial
intelligence, and bioengineering. The
future of work requires a whole new
skill set. Are you ready for it?
